description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Short beige sleeveless nightdress, has a V neckline, laced straps and bust, gathers below the bust and comes with a sash to be tied around the waist Material and Care Fabric: 100% polyester Trims: 90% nylon and 10% spandex Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
